sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60487" key="kubepi/kubos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠβεπίκῠβος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n60487.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κυβόκυβος</ref></xr>, Theodoret.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Therap.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.52</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
